subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-05 in London
subcodes.first_line: I was not feeling well; I have come outside purely for your sake. And yet, tomorrow I must go to Edinburgh
subcodes.first_line_orig: احوالم خوب نبود محض خاطر شما بیرون آمدم ... بیانات من مثل تخم پاکی باشد که در اراضی طیبه کشته میشود
subcodes.subjects: @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @love of God
